content:
# Spoke CLI Design (2026-03-28)

Detailed design for `corvia workspace spoke` subcommand group.

## Commands
- `spoke create --repo <name> --issue <N>` - spawn spoke container with Docker, clone repo, start Claude Code
- `spoke list` - query Docker for containers with `corvia.spoke=true` label
- `spoke logs <name>` - stream spoke container logs
- `spoke destroy <name>` - stop and remove spoke container

## Key Architecture
- HubContext: resolves Docker-from-Docker host paths via `docker inspect $(hostname)`
- SpokeProvisioner: extends existing DockerProvisioner in corvia-kernel
- State tracked via Docker labels (stateless, no files)
- Agent identity via CORVIA_AGENT_ID env var (unique per spoke)
- Auth via host-path mount of .credentials.json (read-only)
- Network via hub's Docker compose network (auto-detected)

## Config
`[workspace.spokes]` section in corvia.toml: image, network, auth_mode

## Implementation: 9 tasks across corvia-common, corvia-kernel, corvia-cli
Doc: docs/decisions/2026-03-28-spoke-cli-design.md
